blocks.text: 🚴 Gent-Wevelgem 11:00 — Wærenskjold, Abrahamsen & Hoelgaard chase Spring Classic glory in Flanders
♟️ Wed 16:00 — Magnus Carlsen opens FIDE Candidates 2026, World Chess Championship battle starts
The FIDE Candidates crowns the next World Chess Championship challenger. Carlsen's Wednesday opener is the sporting event of the week — mark it in your calendar.
